content_sections.heading: RCF Kapurthala Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The Rail Coach Factory Kapurthala (RCF Kapurthala) Recruitment 2026 notification released for 23 posts of Sports Quota. Candidates with ITI, 10TH Can Apply Offline. The Offline application process for RCF Kapurthala Recruitment 2026 has started on 15-06-2026 and will remain open until 14-07-2026. The candidate shall apply Offline through RCF Kapurthala website, rcf.indianrailways.gov.in.

content_sections.heading: RCF Kapurthala Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Download
content_sections.text: The RCF Kapurthala Sports Quota Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF has been released on 15-06-2026 at rcf.indianrailways.gov.in. Check the complete job details, vacancy, age limit, application fee, selection process and how to apply from the article. You can Check all Latest Sarkari Result Updates of All Central Government Jobs and State Government Jobs. RCF Kapurthala Sports Quota Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Name of the Post : RCF Kapurthala Sports Quota Offline Form 2026 Post Date : 15-06-2026 Total Vacancy : 23 Posts Brief Information: The Rail Coach Factory Kapurthala (RCF Kapurthala) has announced a notification for the recruitment of Sports Quota Vacancy. Eligible Candidates who are interested in the vacancy details & completed all eligibility criteria can read the notification & Apply.

content_sections.heading: RCF Kapurthala Recruitment 2026 Notification Overview
content_sections.text: The Rail Coach Factory Kapurthala (RCF Kapurthala) has officially released a recruitment notification for Sports Quota. For all details regarding the recruitment process, eligibility, and application procedure, refer to the official notification. Eligible candidates can download it from the link below.

rows.rail_coach_factory_kapurthala_rcf_kapurt: Application Fee All candidates except SC/ST/Ex-Servicemen/Persons with Disability/Women/Minorities/Economic Backward Class : Rs 500 SC/ST/Ex-Servicemen/Persons with Disability/Women/Minorities/Economic Backward Class : Rs 250
RCF Kapurthala Recruitment 2026 Important Dates Starting Date for Apply: 15-06-2026 Last Date for Apply : 14-07-2026
RCF Kapurthala Recruitment 2026 Age Limit Minimum Age Limit: 18 Years Maximum Age limit: 25 Years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

Eligibility Criteria For Level-1 (G. P. 1800) Posts: 10th Pass OR ITI OR equivalent OR NAC (National Apprenticeship Certificate) granted by NCVT. For Technician-III (Level-2, G. P. 1900) Posts: 10th Pass OR 10th Pass plus Course completed Act Apprentice/ITI certificate granted by NCVT in relevant trades. For Senior Clerk- Cum-Typist (Level-4/5, G. P. 2400/2800) Posts: Degree From Recognized University or its equivalents. Typing proficiency in English/Hindi on Computer is essential.
Salary Level-1 (G. P. 1800): Pay Band/Scale 5200-20200+1800 Level-2 (G. P. 1900): Pay Band/Scale 5200-20200+1900 Level-4/5 (G. P. 2400/2800): Pay Band/Scale 5200-20200+2400/2800
Selection Process Trial Assessment of recognized sports achievements Game skill, physical fitness and coach's observation during trials Educational Qualification
RCF Kapurthala Sports Quota Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
Interested Candidates Can Read the Full Notification Before Apply

content_sections.heading: RCF Kapurthala Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
content_sections.text: Starting Date for Apply: 15-06-2026 Last Date for Apply : 14-07-2026

content_sections.heading: RCF Kapurthala Recruitment 2026 Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age Limit: 18 Years Maximum Age limit: 25 Years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies announced under RCF Kapurthala Sports Quota Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Rail Coach Factory Kapurthala has announced a total of 23 Sports Quota vacancies in various sports disciplines.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for RCF Kapurthala Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form is 14 July 2026.

faq.question: Q3. When did the application process start for RCF Kapurthala Sports Quota Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The offline application process started on 15 June 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for RCF Kapurthala Sports Quota Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 and 25 years of age. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What educational qualifications are required for RCF Kapurthala Sports Quota posts?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess 10th Pass, ITI, NAC, or Degree qualifications depending on the post level and category applied for.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for RCF Kapurthala Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500 for General candidates and Rs. 250 for SC/ST, Ex-Servicemen, Persons with Disability, Women, Minorities, and Economically Backward Class candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for RCF Kapurthala Sports Quota Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes sports trials, assessment of sports achievements, game skills, physical fitness, and coach observations during the trials.

faq.question: Q8. Which sports disciplines are included in RCF Kapurthala Sports Quota Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Vacancies are available for Hockey, Weightlifting, Athletics, Cross Country, Wrestling, Football, and Cricket.

faq.question: Q9. What salary will be offered under RCF Kapurthala Sports Quota Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive pay as per Railway pay levels, ranging from Pay Band Rs. 5200–20200 with Grade Pay of Rs. 1800, Rs. 1900, Rs. 2400, or Rs. 2800 depending on the post.

faq.question: Q10. How can candidates apply for RCF Kapurthala Sports Quota Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates must submit their application offline through the prescribed format available on the official RCF Kapurthala website before the closing date.
